channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hunter Biden appears in Los Angeles, responds to queries about Biden tapes and UFO files
item.description: A videographer approached Hunter Biden in West Los Angeles, asking about legal efforts to release President Joe Biden's interview recordings.

item.title: Steve Scalise delivers a sharp retort to Tim Walz's attack on his health condition
Red-state auditor reports surge in fraud tips while targeting state employees for wasteful spending
item.description: Nebraska's top auditor notes a rise in fraud reports as he investigates alleged waste by state workers and disputes Governor Pillen over a $2 million contract.

item.title: After Indiana purge, Trump targets Louisiana's Bill Cassidy
item.description: Senator Bill Cassidy faces a tough reelection in Louisiana's GOP primary as Trump and allies back Representative Julia Letlow to replace him.
